verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED WITH: {source} note or log entry is supplemented by a construction photo providing visual evidence of the recorded condition
verbGlossary.ILLUSTRATED BY: {source} is accompanied by construction photos that visually represent the day's site conditions
verbGlossary.EVIDENCED BY: {source}record is supported by photographic evidence showing installed work or crew activity
verbGlossary.CAPTURED IN: Inspection entry findings are recorded within a 360-degree photo for spatial context and documentation
verbGlossary.LOCATED IN: {source} is pinpointed within a 360-degree capture to show the exact location and surrounding conditions
verbGlossary.SUPERSEDED BY: Plan revision received in the field is replaced by an updated {target}-based drawing issued from the current design
verbGlossary.REFERENCED AGAINST: {source} entry compares actual field conditions to {target}-based drawing for conformance
verbGlossary.IMPACTS: {source} entry records a disruption that affects {target} construction sequence and timeline
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED BY: Scheduled field work follows the construction sequence defined in the 4D schedule-linked {target}
verbGlossary.LINKED TO: Scheduled work task link connects the field activity directly to a specific task in {target}
verbGlossary.STAFFED PER: {source} entry records labor deployed according to {target} phased workforce plan
verbGlossary.MOBILIZED PER: {source} entry records equipment deployed to match {target} construction sequence requirements
verbGlossary.DELIVERED FOR: {source} entry records material arriving at site for installation into a specific {target} element
verbGlossary.INSTALLED INTO: {source} confirms that delivered goods have been accepted for installation into {target} element
verbGlossary.MEASURED AGAINST: {source} quantity log entry is compared to {target}-based quantity takeoff to track installed vs. planned quantities
verbGlossary.COMPARED TO: {source} is compared to takeoff quantities to calculate field productivity variance
verbGlossary.GENERATED BY: {source} entry records scrap or debris produced during installation of a specific building element in {target}
verbGlossary.INCURRED FROM: {source}cost is incurred because of rework or additional scope from {target}
verbGlossary.CORRELATED WITH: {source} is analyzed alongside photo documentation rate to measure field reporting discipline
verbGlossary.SUPPLEMENTED BY: {source} entry is supplemented by drone capture imagery showing site conditions from aerial perspective
verbGlossary.SITUATED IN: {source} entry location is identified within {target} to reconstruct the spatial context of the incident
